ui.split_info: Choose how to split your PDF. Enter ranges like 1-3, 5, 7-9 to extract specific pages.
ui.invalid_range: Invalid page range. Please use formats like 1-3, 5, 7-9.
ui.reorder_info: Upload a PDF, then drag pages to reorder them. Click the buttons to move one step, or drag rows.
ui.compress_explainer: Choose a compression level. Light preserves text as selectable; Medium and Strong re-render pages as compressed images (smaller files, text won't be searchable).
ui.level_light_desc: Strip metadata, reflow streams. Text remains searchable.
ui.level_medium_desc: Re-render pages at 150 DPI. Smaller files, text becomes image.
ui.level_strong_desc: Re-render at 100 DPI, JPEG quality 60. Smallest files.

footer.made_with: Made with care for the global community

about.intro_p1: UtilBoxx is a free online toolbox built for the global community. We provide 40+ carefully crafted tools across 7 categories: PDF, image, text, unit conversion, color, cryptography, and developer utilities.
about.intro_p2: All tools run entirely in your browser. Your files never touch our servers. This isn't just a privacy feature — it's the foundation of how we think tools should work in 2026.
about.intro_p3: Founded in 2026, UtilBoxx is a small independent project. We're not venture-backed, we don't sell your data, and we don't have a premium tier. Just useful tools, in your language, for free.
why_items: 100% Free — no hidden fees, no premium tiers, no limits
Privacy First — all processing happens in your browser, files never leave your device
No Signup — start using tools instantly, no account required
Multi-language — supports 7 languages: English, Chinese, Japanese, Spanish, Portuguese, French, German
Mobile Friendly — works perfectly on phones, tablets, and desktops
No Ads Tracking — we don't follow you around the web with ads
about.mission_p1: We believe useful tools should be free, fast, and respect user privacy. The web has become bloated with ads, paywalls, and data collection. UtilBoxx is our small contribution to a better web.
about.mission_p2: Every tool is designed to be the simplest version of itself. No upsells, no newsletter popups, no dark patterns. Just the tool you came for.
about.tech_p1: UtilBoxx is built with Next.js 14, TypeScript, and Tailwind CSS. PDF processing uses pdf-lib, image processing uses the Canvas API and browser-image-compression, and everything else runs natively in modern browsers.
about.tech_p2: We deploy on Vercel's global edge network, which means fast load times wherever you are in the world.
about.contact_p1: Have feedback, suggestions, or found a bug? We'd love to hear from you. Visit our Contact page to send us a message.
